description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style hatchback car with a dark blue exterior and a boxy, rounded silhouette reminiscent of classic European city cars. The vehicle features two side doors, blacked-out windows, and small, circular side mirrors. The wheels are modest in size with simple hubcaps, and the rear of the car includes a large window and vented paneling, as well as yellow and red tail lights. The front is characterized by a minimalist grille, rectangular headlights, and small bumper guards. The overall design suggests a lightweight, utilitarian vehicle suitable for urban environments, with a likely metal body and glass windows.
description: A compact, vintage dark blue hatchback car with two side doors, blacked-out windows, and simple wheels, featuring a minimalist front and vented rear paneling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, two doors, blacked-out windows, and the front and rear wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the large rear window, vented panel, and yellow/red tail lights.
description_view_2: Side view showing the right profile, mirroring the left with two doors and simple wheels.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the minimalist grille, rectangular headlights, and small bumper guards.
